---
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<p class="text-center">
  <a class="btn btn-primary btn-lg cv-download" href="cv.pdf" target="_blank">
    <i class="fa-solid fa-file-arrow-down"></i>&ensp;Download current CV
  </a>
</p>
```

# Current position

## PhD Candidate August 2023-present day

### Centre for Development and Environment - University of Bern

Include Commonpaths project here

# Education

## MSc in applied and social psychology September 2020-Juni 2022

### Faculty of Psychology and Educational Sciences - University of Geneva

## BSc in psychology September 2017-Juni 2020

### Faculty of Psychology and Educational Sciences - University of Geneva
